description: GDPR and data protection news from credible sources. Each item links to the original article. Update this file or use a script to fetch from RSS/news pages.

Relevant for GDPR compliance and data protection practice.

items.snippet: Joint statement on fundamental rights and high-risk AI systems.

items.title: Our response to Google's policy change on fingerprinting
items.snippet: ICO stresses data protection law and consent still apply.
summaryParagraphs: ICO stresses data protection law and consent still apply. The ICO has responded to Google’s policy change and reminded businesses that they must still comply with UK law.
This update is from ICO (UK). For the full story and official wording, open the link above.
Relevant for GDPR compliance and data protection practice.

This update is from ICO (UK). For the full story and official wording, open the link above.

items.title: Convention 108+ and modernisation
items.snippet: Modernised Convention 108 for the protection of personal data.
summaryParagraphs: Modernised Convention 108 for the protection of personal data. The amendments bring the Convention in line with current data processing and stronger rights.

Relevant for GDPR compliance and data protection practice.
